violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the sushi area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Raw animal foods (chicken, beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, prep table) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Salmon and tuna was observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
Sauces were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (between prep table and prep unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
Sushi cooler was not in good repair, ambient was observed at 47F. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the Shelving (walk-in cooler, ware washing, prep tables) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored throughout the kitchen area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
